Package org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp

Interface Content

All Known Implementing Classes:
EmbeddedResourceContent, ImageContent, TextContent
@Marshalled(typePropertyName="type", dictionary={TextContent.class,ImageContent.class,EmbeddedResourceContent.class}) public interface Content
Polymorphic MCP content block (tool results, prompt messages).

Wire objects carry a type discriminator with values text, image, or resource.
